_comment: Class G (eager-collect-parity). A #[pyfunction]/#[pymethod]/Constructor that eagerly materializes a Python-controlled iterable into a Vec where CPython requires a sized container and rejects in O(1). The interprocedural Python-name->helper parity chain is OPAQUE through atomic_func! slot dispatch (the v0.1 wall), so this is site-enumeration + this SAFE list + a human differential (CONSIDER only). The parity gap is EXACTLY the 5 fuzzer findings 0012-0016; the general ArgIterable mechanism is NOT itself a new source once CPython type-checking is accounted for.
_safe_function_note: Matched EXACTLY against the Rust fn name or Python name. Verified SAFE by the fuzzer: all/any short-circuit lazily; join/dist balloon in BOTH interpreters (Class J, out of scope); fsum/prod are bounded; attrgetter/itemgetter/methodcaller take bounded varargs.
class_j_exclusions_do_not_report: note: abort-vs-MemoryError (both interpreters balloon) is Class J, upstream #3493/#1779, OUT OF SCOPE
